recommendation_notes.discovery_official_rationale: discovery_12f_source selected over discovery_12f_class_balanced due to substantially better calibration (ECE 0.0491 vs 0.0938) with only minor AUC sacrifice (0.8036 vs 0.8131). Calibration robustness prioritized over raw AUC maximization for official deployment.
recommendation_notes.discovery_challenger_rationale: discovery_12f_class_balanced retained as challenger due to highest raw AUC (0.8131), but calibration near threshold (ECE 0.0938, 94% of 0.10 limit) requires further validation before official promotion.
recommendation_notes.governance_official_rationale: phylo_support_fusion_priority retained as official. No statistically significant superiority established for governance_15f_pruned (paired_delong_p=0.405, AUC actually lower by -0.0037). Stability-first semantics require compelling evidence for baseline replacement.
recommendation_notes.governance_challenger_rationale: governance_15f_pruned classified as STABILITY_PRESERVING (AUC loss -0.0037 within tolerance, ECE acceptable). Parsimonious alternative worth retaining, but temporal/rolling evidence not evaluated prevents official promotion.
statistical_honesty_notes: All p-values reported are paired DeLong test results, NOT selection-adjusted permutation-null p-values
True selection-adjusted inference would require build_selection_adjusted_permutation_null() execution
Temporal/rolling evidence was NOT evaluated for any candidate — explicitly reported as 'not_evaluated'
caveats: discovery_12f_class_balanced ECE (0.0938) approaches threshold — monitor closely if promoted later
Governance temporal evidence incomplete — hybrid experiments may strengthen promotion case
No config.yaml changes applied — human review required before official promotion
next_steps: Human review of this decision package
Optionally execute Phase 6.2 governance hybrid to strengthen governance evidence
Manual config.yaml update if conservative promotion approved
